code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < parts.len()
  let p = match parts.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(p)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, n)
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
let total = list.len(nums)
mut j = total - 1
while j >= 0
  let v = match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == total - 1
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j - 1
end

println(out)
